Settings.title: Account Settings
Settings.subtitle: Manage your profile, security, and preferences.

Language.title: Language
Language.description: Choose the language used across the app.

hero.subtitle: AI-powered recommendations for movies and books tailored to your unique taste.

howItWorks.title: From indecision to a great pick in four steps
howItWorks.subtitle: A faster way to land on a watch or read worth your time.

format.title: Pick your format
format.description: Tell us if you're in the mood for a movie, a book, or both. We tailor the rest of the flow to whichever you choose.

depth.title: Set your depth
depth.description: Choose how many questions you want to answer — a quick taste check or a deep dive, your call.

quiz.title: Answer a personalized quiz
quiz.description: Our AI generates fresh questions tuned to your age and content type. No two quizzes are the same.

picks.title: Get your picks
picks.description: Real recommendations with a match score and a written reason for why each one fits you specifically.

features.title: Built for picks you can trust
features.subtitle: Private by design, fast by default, and open source so you can see how it works.

private.title: Private Profile
private.description: Your preferences stay tied to your account and are used only to improve your picks.

fast.title: Warp Speed Results
fast.description: Quick results and smooth updates help you decide without waiting around.

trust.title: Easy-To-Trust Picks
trust.description: Clear reasons make each suggestion easier to trust and choose, with open-source transparency.

both.title: Choose Across Both
both.description: See book and movie results in one place so choosing feels faster and easier.

groupQuizCta.description: Host a quiz, share a six-character code, and let the group answer. The AI synthesizes everyone's taste into one pick that works for the room. Joining is free — no account needed.

poweredBy.title: Built on trusted infrastructure
poweredBy.subtitle: Trusted services that help Smart Advisor stay fast, dependable, and helpful.

faq.title: Questions, answered
faq.subtitleLead: Questions before you get started? Reach out at
faq.subtitleTail: . Smart Advisor is open source, so you can review and contribute anytime.

Auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

Library.title: What You've Watched and Read
Library.subtitle: Reactions you save here become a taste signal the AI uses on your next quiz.

empty.noItemsBody: After your next quiz, hit "I watched / read this" on a result and it will show up here.
empty.noMatchesBody: Try changing or clearing the filters above.

contentSelection.title: What would you like a recommendation for?
contentSelection.subtitle: Pick one so we can tailor your recommendation flow.
contentSelection.validation: Please select an option before continuing.

movie.title: Movie
movie.description: A film tuned to your current mood and pace.

book.title: Book
book.description: A read tailored to your style and interests.

both.title: One of each
both.description: A movie and a book picked together in one go.

questionCount.title: How many questions should we ask?
questionCount.subtitle: Choose the depth for your {contentType} recommendation flow.

subtitle.fillInBlank: Share your thoughts in your own words.
subtitle.selectAll: Choose as many as you like.
subtitle.singleSelect: Pick one so we can tune your recommendations.

questionnaire.leaveConfirm: Leave the quiz? Your answers so far won't be saved.

errors.title: Unable to load questions
errors.session: Your session expired. Please sign in again to continue.
errors.generic: We could not generate your questions. Please try again.

loadingMessages: Stirring in a twist or two…
Running it by our AI once more…
